title: Assistant Manager, Clinical Operations (West/ up to $5,000 + AWS + VB)
description:
Job ID: 1174932

Responsibilities:  

  • Ensure operational readiness by managing resources, updating SOPs/workflows, resolving operational/IT issues, and handling patient feedback with stakeholders.
  • Support MOH inspections and lead annual workplan and budget planning with multidisciplinary teams.
  • Partner with Clinical Services Director and Clinical Leads to plan, coordinate, and implement service strategies, new workflows, and improvement initiatives.
  • Contribute to planning discussions for the upcoming campus.
  • Provide renal counselling and case management for CKD patients; coordinate financial assistance, interim haemodialysis placements, and oversee PD claims.
  • Manage staff onboarding, training, competency development, and maintain updated competency records.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in any discipline.
  • 3–5 years of experience in the healthcare or service industry.
  • Strong communication, problem-solving, presentation, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Effective team player with solid analytical and organizational abilities.
  • Able to manage multiple tasks and work well under tight deadlines.
  • Self-motivated, independent, and able to take initiative.
  • Comfortable working in ambiguity and dynamic environments; enjoys challenges and problem-solving.
  • Committed to continuous improvement, innovation, and productivity enhancement.
  • Proficient in SAP and MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).

To Apply, please kindly email your updated resume to 

elaine@goodjobcreations.com.sg

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, rest assured that all applications will be updated to our resume bank for future opportunities

Please kindly refer to the Privacy Policy of Good Job Creations for your reference:

https://goodjobcreations.com.sg/en/privacy-policy/
